User.title: User
User.description: A user of the Pluto-tech platform.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user.

createdAt.description: When the user account was created.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: An order placed by a user for a specific service.

userId.description: The ID of the user who placed the order.

serviceId.description: The ID of the service ordered.

serviceTitle.description: The title of the service ordered.

option.description: The specific option selected within the service.

platform.description: The platform the user chose to contact on.
